prd_ref: PRD §6 New Player Case / §7 Eval A
title: New player seated into a predatory table mix
fixture_note: Operator-facing demo-case scenario. Structure + entity references only — NO computed scores or classifications (P3 produces those from this scaffold + Contract-1 data). The pit_boss_evidence_seed values are the ground-truth seeds from seeded_case_labels.json, restated here as the demo narrative target, not computed by P2.
narrative: P-104 is a 4-day-old new player (31 lifetime hands). On a seat request the room can route them to T-22 (short-handed 3/6, high-volatility, two aggressive/high-volume regulars P-176/P-177) or to a balanced table. T-22 is statistically beginner-unfriendly: new players seated there churn fast (~12-min sessions vs ~42 min at a healthy table). This is a TABLE-HEALTH risk, not an integrity risk — no collusion, no device link, no cluster. The harm is silent churn, not cheating.

demo_spine.lobby: Player lobby shows neutral copy only. FairPlay path: T-8 'Recommended for you', T-14 'Good fit', T-22 'Available' (de-prioritized internally — never labeled predatory player-side).
demo_spine.pit_boss: Operator console surfaces table-health score, new-player seating risk, composition, reason codes, and the alternative route. Operator can accept reroute / override / suppress T-22 for new players.
demo_spine.simulator: Room Impact Simulator contrasts P-104 churning at T-22 (Standard) vs retained at T-8 (FairPlay).
demo_spine.eval: Eval A checks the case is classed beginner_unfriendly (table_health), rerouted, and NOT conflated with integrity risk.

divergence_points.standard: T-22 promoted normally to new/rec players
divergence_points.fairplay: T-22 suppressed from new/rec lobby (reason: beginner_unfriendly)

divergence_points.standard: P-104 seated at T-22 (no risk-aware routing) → ~12-min session, early exit
divergence_points.fairplay: P-104 routed to T-8 (balanced) → ~42-min session, retained

expected_outcome.standard: P-104 churns; T-22 trends fragile/beginner-unfriendly; contributes to lower new-player retention.
expected_outcome.fairplay: P-104 retained at T-8; new-player retention preserved.

pit_boss_evidence_seed.note: Ground-truth seeds from seeded_case_labels.json — restated as demo target. P3 computes the real packet.

counter_evidence: T-22 aggressors P-176/P-177 are playing legally — strong/aggressive is not cheating.
A single new player's short session is not proof the table is bad; the pattern across new players is the signal.
Health risk only — must not be escalated to integrity review.
lens_separation_guard: This case is TABLE_HEALTH only. It must not be scored or summarized as an integrity/collusion case. Conflating it with CASE-C (integrity) is a failing eval.
id_reconciliation: Table-label padding RESOLVED by Aria (branch sim/aria-case-c-table-id): canonical is 'T-8' (no leading zero) — adopted here.
All player IDs (P-104, P-176, P-177) match across players.json + seeded_case_labels.json.
